schema_version: Internal schema version marker, not an operator lever. Shown implicitly by the panel working at all; a version the panel cannot read would fail to load.
state_dir: Structural path to the durable-state directory, always .modonome in practice. Not something an operator changes per session.
providers: Advanced provider-registry override (transport, cost class, auth env var per provider). Rare, expert-only edit. Extend Settings > Roles & models with a Providers table if this becomes a common need; until then, edit config.yaml directly.
snapshot: Tuning for the repo-snapshot artifact generator (ADR-032): CI strictness, signing, parser choice, token budget, redaction strictness. A build-time context artifact, not an autonomy lever an operator adjusts per session. Surface it in Settings if hosts start asking to tune it; until then, edit config.yaml directly.
remediation_apply_enabled: Arms the metadata-only commit-history remediator's apply step (ADR-035), off by default and capability-gated. Its owner-facing lever family (a proposal queue plus an approve action) is the Phase 2 control-panel follow-up; until that lands, apply is CLI-only and owner-gated, so this flag is exempt here rather than rendered as a bare toggle.
